title: CodeGrind's AI Assistant: Secure Guidance and Model Flexibility
summary: Explore how CodeGrind's AI assistant, powered by Azure OpenAI and GPT-4o, provides secure, flexible coding guidance with built-in safety controls and model switching capabilities.

social.bluesky_text: CodeGrind's AI assistant offers secure coding guidance with Azure OpenAI & GPT-4o. Switch models and benefit from built-in safety controls for a flexible learning experience. Enhance your DSA practice! #CodeGrind #AI #DSA #Coding https://rivie13.github.io/blog/2026/04/02/codegrind-secure-ai-assistance-workflow/
social.linkedin_text: CodeGrind is enhancing DSA practice with a new AI assistant, powered by Azure OpenAI and GPT-4o. Our assistant provides secure, flexible coding guidance, including model switching capabilities and built-in safety controls, all within an enterprise-grade environment. This integration balances gamified learning with practical problem-solving, helping users develop deeper understanding of Data Structures and Algorithms. Learn more about how CodeGrind's AI assistant can support your coding journey: https://rivie13.github.io/blog/2026/04/02/codegrind-secure-ai-assistance-workflow/ #CodeGrind #AIinEducation #AzureOpenAI #GPT4o #DSA #CodingPractice #InterviewPrep
